resources.string: Shows active hotspot status and controls
Location permission is required to read Wi-Fi SSID and manage the hotspot on Android 10+.
Phone state permission is required to access network usage statistics.
Notification permission is required to show the persistent hotspot status notification on Android 13+.
USB Tethering requires manual activation. Tap below to open Android Settings.
Full packet-level blocking requires root. The app manages a local blocklist and excludes blocked devices on hotspot restart.
